title: iria androgyna
intro: Iria androgyna, also known as the androgynous tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iria androgyna include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Iria androgyna can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in water or by creating a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
